name: Today
detailedForecast: Areas of smoke before noon, then areas of smoke and a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between noon and 1pm, then areas of smoke and a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 1pm and 2pm, then areas of smoke and showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Mostly cloudy. High near 84, with temperatures falling to around 75 in the afternoon. Southwest wind 3 to 20 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.
